headline: Jefferies sees downside risk for Tesla stock, warns of SpaceX tracker risk
summary: Investing.com - Jefferies has trimmed its Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) price target to $375 and flagged a new structural risk for the stock: that growing market consensus around a Tesla-SpaceX merger could effectively transform TSLA shares into a de facto SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) tracking stock.

headline: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
summary: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group.  Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was going on", a source familiar with the matter said, adding that Tata had received a ransom demand related to the incident.  Apple did not respond to requests for comment.

content.title: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
content.summary: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group.  Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was going on", a source familiar with the matter said, adding that Tata had received a ransom demand related to the incident.  Apple did not respond to requests for comment.

headline: Tesla's Missing 10,000: Is Optimus Falling Behind The Robotics Pack?
summary: Tesla (TSLA) is valued at more than $1.2 trillion. The automotive business holding that number up is shrinking. Full-year 2025 revenue came in at $94.8 billion, down 3 percent, the company's first annual revenue decline ever. Auto revenue fell 10 percent to $69.5 billion, margins are tighter, and BYD and other Chinese automakers keep gaining global share.

content.title: Tesla's Missing 10,000: Is Optimus Falling Behind The Robotics Pack?
content.summary: Tesla (TSLA) is valued at more than $1.2 trillion. The automotive business holding that number up is shrinking. Full-year 2025 revenue came in at $94.8 billion, down 3 percent, the company's first annual revenue decline ever. Auto revenue fell 10 percent to $69.5 billion, margins are tighter, and BYD and other Chinese automakers keep gaining global share.

headline: Jefferies Lowers Tesla Target and Highlights Potential SpaceX Tracking Stock Risk
summary: Jefferies has reduced its price target on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to $375 and identified what it sees as an emerging structural risk for shareholders: the possibility that expectations surrounding a future combination with SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) could cause Tesla shares to increasingly trade as a proxy for SpaceX. The brokerage argues that growing investor belief in a potential merger between the two companies may begin to influence Tesla’s valuation independently of its own business performance.

content.title: Jefferies Lowers Tesla Target and Highlights Potential SpaceX Tracking Stock Risk
content.summary: Jefferies has reduced its price target on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to $375 and identified what it sees as an emerging structural risk for shareholders: the possibility that expectations surrounding a future combination with SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) could cause Tesla shares to increasingly trade as a proxy for SpaceX. The brokerage argues that growing investor belief in a potential merger between the two companies may begin to influence Tesla’s valuation independently of its own business performance.

headline: Century Communities Debuts Multiple Home Collections at New Community Near Austin's Tech Corridor
summary: Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS)—a top national homebuilder, industry leader in online home sales, and featured on America's Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek—recently hosted a Grand Opening event for Evelyn, a new single-family home community bringing three distinct home collections to Northeast Austin. Evelyn also boasts a variety of community amenities—including scenic ponds, a pool, and miles of trails—in a prime location near Austin's Tech Corridor.

headline: Heavy SpaceX Options Trading Driven by New Weekly Contracts
summary: Trading in  SpaceX  options remained heavy Thursday, their third day since the options launch.  As of 1 p.m. ET, 1.26 million SpaceX options had traded, about equally divided between calls and puts.  SpaceX ranked third among all stocks for options trading, behind only  Nvidia  and  Tesla  according to data from Susquehanna Investment Group.

content.title: Heavy SpaceX Options Trading Driven by New Weekly Contracts

SpaceX ranked third among all stocks for options trading, behind only  Nvidia  and  Tesla  according to data from Susquehanna Investment Group.

headline: Alphabet Stock Drags Down the Nasdaq
summary: Alphabet stock's sharp slide was dragging down the Nasdaq. The tech-heavy index was down 1%. The S&P 500 was down 0.3%. The Dow, which does not include Alphabet, was up 183 points, or 0.4%. Shares of the Google parent tumbled more than 6%.
